entries.title: Mapping Europe's AI Workforce Opportunity
entries.raw_summary: OpenAI released a report examining how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, identifying which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
entries.rationale: 欧洲 AI 职业影响分析报告

entries.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
entries.raw_summary: Jason Liu demonstrates how Codex preserves context, manages complex projects, and enables work to continue beyond single prompts.
entries.rationale: Codex 长期工作管理实践

entries.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
entries.raw_summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to identify 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved rare disease cases in children.
entries.rationale: reasoning 模型罕见病诊断突破

entries.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
entries.raw_summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one demonstrate how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction.
entries.rationale: AI chemist 首次改进药物反应

entries.title: AI当老板，快给10家公司干破产了…
entries.raw_summary: 画出那个矩阵的能力——还属于人类。
entries.rationale: AI CEO 自主决策失败案例

entries.title: 啥？做AI短剧可以免费，免费，免费了！
entries.raw_summary: 我反手做了个修仙爽剧
entries.rationale: AI 短剧生成免费化

entries.title: From Brain Waves to Words: Brain2Qwerty Offers a New Path to Communication Without Surgery
entries.raw_summary: Research article exploring Brain2Qwerty technology that enables communication through brain signals without requiring surgical intervention.
entries.rationale: Meta Brain2Qwerty 无创 BCI

entries.title: How agents are transforming work
entries.raw_summary: A new OpenAI research paper demonstrates how AI agents enable longer, more complex tasks and expand productivity across various professional roles.
entries.rationale: Agent 长期任务能力研究，影响设计范式

entries.title: Import AI 463: Self-improving robots; a 10k Chinese GPU cluster; and an elegiac essay for the human era
entries.raw_summary: NVIDIA develops ENPIRE software enabling robots to autonomously improve policies through self-experimentation. Tencent details ARGUS system for managing 10,000+ GPU training clusters. Essay explores potential human disempowerment in superintelligent AI future.
entries.rationale: ENPIRE 机器人自改进、GPU 管理综述

entries.title: AI助手不该只等人提问：清华团队两项新研究，探索理解用户与适时互动
entries.raw_summary: 清华大学人工智能学院发布EgoIntrospect与IPIBench两项研究成果。前者聚焦AI如何理解用户的情绪、意图和记忆需求；后者关注AI在连续视频流中如何判断何时提醒、何时沉默。两项研究表明下一代AI助手应学会读懂人并适时互动。
entries.rationale: Agent 主动理解交互研究

entries.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
entries.raw_summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex globally to employees, representing one of OpenAI's largest enterprise AI rollouts.
entries.rationale: Samsung 全球员工 AI 部署

entries.title: How Revolut runs AI at scale
entries.raw_summary: Revolut's machine learning head Nikolay Donets discusses operating AI in a regulated fintech serving 70M+ customers across 40 countries. Key insights include governance by use-case, centralized gateway architecture, fallback chains, and maintaining human oversight for critical decisions.
entries.rationale: Revolut 大规模 AI 运营

entries.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
entries.raw_summary: OpenAI introduces spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI confidently.
entries.rationale: Enterprise 成本管理工具发布

entries.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
entries.raw_summary: GPT-5.5 Instant enhances ChatGPT's health responses with improved reasoning, context, clarity, and physician-informed evaluations.
entries.rationale: GPT-5.5 医疗推理增强

entries.title: Latest open artifacts (#22): Zyphra, Cohere, and Poolside are expanding the breadth of the ecosystem
entries.raw_summary: Assessment of the open ecosystem showing increasing diversity of model makers. Categories include pure model makers (DeepSeek, Poolside), Big Tech companies (Alibaba, Google), and product companies (JetBrains, Zed). Notable releases: NVIDIA Nemotron-3 Ultra, Cohere Command A+, GLM-5.2, Zyphra ZAYA1, and Poolside Laguna-M.1.
entries.rationale: 开源模型生态评述

entries.title: 全球首个：隐空间世界模型，打通长时序双向物理因果链了！
entries.raw_summary: 刚融了2亿美元，冲到了具身榜单第一
entries.rationale: 隐空间世界模型融资

entries.title: OceanBase发布AI数据库：以一套引擎融合湖库与多模态数据
entries.raw_summary: 让AI真正'读懂'企业
entries.rationale: OceanBase AI 数据库发布

entries.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
entries.raw_summary: LifeSciBench is an expert-authored benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
entries.rationale: 生命科学专用 eval benchmark

entries.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
entries.raw_summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data.
entries.rationale: 模型部署前风险预测方法

entries.title: Adaptive Financial Transformer with Regime-Gated Attention for Stock Return Prediction
entries.raw_summary: arxiv paper id 2606.29347 by Dishan Sarkar
entries.rationale: 金融 Transformer 应用论文

entries.title: Reliability, Faithfulness, and the Limits of Post-hoc Explanations of Opaque Scientific Models
entries.raw_summary: arxiv paper id 2606.29346 by Nick Oh et al.
entries.rationale: 可解释性限制研究

entries.title: PHF: Privileged Hidden Flow for On-Policy Self-Distillation
entries.raw_summary: arxiv paper id 2606.29340 by Yuhan Li et al.
entries.rationale: 自蒸馏方法论

entries.title: Nonlinear mixture model motivated subspace clustering
entries.raw_summary: arxiv paper id 2606.29261 by Ivica Kopriva
entries.rationale: 聚类方法基础研究

entries.title: PhysisForcing: Physics Reinforced World Simulator for Robotic Manipulation
entries.raw_summary: Video generation models have emerged as a promising paradigm for embodied world simulation. However, both general-domain video generators and robot-specific data fine-tuned models can still produce physically implausible manipulations, including discontinuous motion trajectories and inconsistent robot-object interactions, which limits their reliability as world simulators. Through extensive experiments, we find that such physical instability mainly arises from two factors: deformation of moving
entries.rationale: 物理约束世界模型新方法

entries.title: Translation as a Bridging Action: Transferring Manipulation Skills from Humans to Robots
entries.raw_summary: We study whether we can learn novel manipulation skills from human actions to a bi-manual robot with parallel grippers. Human action data is cheap, abundant, and diverse, making it one of the most promising resources for scaling up robot learning.
entries.rationale: 人类动作到机器人迁移学习

entries.title: Claude Mythos让梁文锋决定融资
entries.raw_summary: DeepSeek不储备弹药根本没法打下去了
entries.rationale: Claude Mythos 启发融资决策

entries.title: 国家队+千亿产业+头部财投集体入局，智平方200亿估值筑就大湾区具身智能名片
entries.raw_summary: 大湾区首个200亿具身智能独角兽诞生！'最像特斯拉'智平方吸金50亿，全矩阵顶级资本重仓
entries.rationale: 智平方具身机器人融资

entries.title: STARK raises €500M to build Europe's next defense prime
entries.raw_summary: German defense company STARK, building autonomous unmanned strike systems, secured €500M in funding led by Sequoia and Founders Fund. The company manufactures software-defined loitering munitions and unmanned vessels designed for rapid, cost-effective production at military scale.
entries.rationale: STARK 防御 AI 融资

entries.title: Odyssey raises $310M Series B for world models
entries.raw_summary: Odyssey, building AI systems that generate interactive worlds rather than static videos, raised $310M at $1.45B valuation. The company developed Starchild-1 for real-time multimodal generation, Agora-1 for multi-agent simulation, and PROWL for self-directed model improvement.
entries.rationale: Odyssey 世界模型融资

entries.title: '词元盗用'正在成为AI商业化面临的新风险
entries.raw_summary: 有人盯上的不是钱，而是 Token
entries.rationale: Token 盗用新安全威胁
